results.description: Array length must match the requested generation count; if no count is requested, output one result. For multi-result cost-priority requests, each item must be an independent lean-but-complete prompt-quality variant, not a shortened summary.

items.description: One complete prompt result describing a single renderable image variant.

plan.description: Optional compact composition summary. If present, English female subject nouns must use girl/girls, never woman/women/lady/ladies.

description.description: Traditional Chinese visual description of the same image.

tags.description: Danbooru tags as a comma-separated string. Female subject tags must use girl/girls forms, never woman/women/lady/ladies.

en.description: English natural-language visual prompt for the same image. Female subject nouns must use girl/girls, never woman/women/lady/ladies.
